sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tom U. @c_APT_ure (collection), oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro

values.CommandLine: cmd.exe /c vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet & wmic shadowcopy delete & bcdedit /set {default} bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures & bcdedit /set {default} recoveryenabled no & wbadmin delete catalog -quiet

cmd.exe /c vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet & wmic shadowcopy delete & bcdedit /set {default} bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures & bcdedit /set {default} recoveryenabled no & wbadmin delete catalog -quiet

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: A General detection for files being created in the Windows startup directory. This could be an indicator of persistence.

compiler_product_versions: [IMP] Windows Server 2003 SP1 DDK build 4035 count=19

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY TLS possible TOR SSL traffic
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp any ![21,25,110,143,443,465,587,636,989:995,5061,5222,8443] -> any any (msg:"ET POLICY TLS possible TOR SSL traffic"; flow:established,from_server; tls.cert_issuer; content:"CN=www"; startswith; content:".com"; endswith; pcre:"/^CN=www\.[0-9a-z]{8,20}\.com$/"; tls.cert_subject; content:"CN=www"; startswith; content:".net"; endswith; pcre:"/^CN=www\.[0-9a-z]{8,20}\.net$/"; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2018789; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2014_07_28, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2023_02_16;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET JA3 Hash - Possible Malware - Malspam
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET JA3 Hash - Possible Malware - Malspam"; ja3_hash; content:"e7d705a3286e19ea42f587b344ee6865"; reference:url,github.com/trisulnsm/trisul-scripts/blob/master/lua/frontend_scripts/reassembly/ja3/prints/ja3fingerprint.json; reference:url,www.malware-traffic-analysis.net; classtype:unknown; sid:2028377; rev:2; metadata:created_at 2019_09_10, confidence Low, signature_severity Major, updated_at 2019_10_29;)
alert icmp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP Destination Unreachable Host Unreachable"; icode:1; itype:3; metadata:ruleset community; classtype:misc-activity; sid:399; rev:9; )
